resources.string: Reads the system timestamp and shows a draggable floating clock with millisecond precision.
Overlay permission is not granted yet. Please enable it first.
Overlay permission granted. You can start the floating clock now.
Tip: drag the overlay to move it. Tap the floating clock to show the close button in the top-right corner.
Keeps the floating overlay visible and refreshes the system time continuously.
Foreground notification channel for the floating clock service.
